title: Unsubdued Slaves
writer: Vion Papamihalis, Marios Ploritis, William Shakespeare
actors: Ellie Lambeti, Yorgos Talanos, Ilias Stamatiou
plot: On the eve of World War II in Athens, a troupe of young actors plans to put on William Shakespeare's, A Midsummer Night's Dream. However, the outbreak of war changes everything.
